action: Assign one avatar to each news genre using available teacher avatar IDs and save the mapping for future retrieval.

recipe.steps: Fetch the list of teacher avatar IDs from memory using the get_data_by_key tool, referencing key avatars.teacher_ids.
Assign the first seven available avatar IDs from the list to genres: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, and Weather, respectively, maintaining order.
Save the avatar-genre assignments into memory under avatars.genre_assignment using the save_data_in_memory tool for easy retrieval during future actions.
